title: Command Lifecycle, Configuration, Pipeline, and Atomic Output
description: The script reads arguments during import, mixes parsing with writes, partially replaces the public directory on failure, and cannot explain which configuration won. Learners cumulatively produce import-safe deterministic build pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Keep import-safe definitions separate from a main entry point that returns meaningful status and writes diagnostics to the correct stream.
Define defaults, project configuration, environment, flags, validation, provenance, and redacted effective configuration.
Separate discover, admit, decode, parse, validate, route, render, asset, verify, stage, and publish contracts.
